label: West Bank and Gaza campaigns
scope: Operations most directly connected to the game's current southern and urban defense framing, especially rocket pressure, tunnel threats, and city protection.

operations.name: Operation Defensive Shield
operations.summary: A major Israeli operation in the West Bank during the Second Intifada focused on dismantling militant infrastructure across multiple urban centers.
historicalDynamics: urban operations were intelligence-heavy and manpower-intensive
multiple cities had to be addressed in sequence without losing the initiative
security pressure and civilian disruption were tightly linked

quotes.speaker: George W. Bush
quotes.quote: The storms of violence cannot go on. Enough is enough.
quotes.sourceNote: Bush Rose Garden statement during the Operation Defensive Shield period.
quotes.relation: International-response framing for the escalation context around Operation Defensive Shield.

candidateObjectives: clear multiple threat hubs before attacks cascade into the center
use intelligence upgrades to reduce ambush risk
hold public morale while the campaign stretches across several cities
mechanicIdeas: linked city sectors where unfinished threats spill into neighboring zones
intel spending that reveals hidden threat nodes
fatigue mechanic that weakens repeated raids without recovery

operations.name: Operation Cast Lead
operations.summary: A Gaza campaign built around reducing rocket fire into southern Israel through airstrikes followed by ground operations.
historicalDynamics: southern towns faced repeated short-warning attacks
airpower opened the campaign but did not remove all launch capability

quotes.speaker: Ehud Olmert
quotes.quote: Israel has never allowed any outside source to determine its right to defend its citizens. The IDF will continue to act to defend the citizens of Israel and carry out the missions laid before it in the operation.
quotes.sourceNote: Olmert statement during Operation Cast Lead after a U.N. ceasefire resolution.
quotes.relation: Directly tied to the continuation logic and defensive framing of Operation Cast Lead.

candidateObjectives: protect southern cities during an opening rocket wave surge
choose when to shift from defense-only to suppression-oriented play
avoid exhausting morale during a long urban-heavy phase
mechanicIdeas: opening salvo phase followed by a ground-pressure modifier
southern shelter network upgrades that reduce civilian loss
urban density penalties that weaken the strongest offensive options

operations.name: Operation Pillar of Defense
operations.summary: A short Gaza conflict centered on airstrikes and rocket exchanges, including pressure on more distant Israeli population centers than earlier rounds.
historicalDynamics: short campaigns could still widen the threatened map footprint
salvos into central Israel changed the sense of national reach
brief escalation windows rewarded rapid readiness

quotes.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
quotes.quote: I announced that we would respond forcibly to these attacks when we see fit. I said that we would exact a heavy price from the terror organizations.
quotes.sourceNote: Netanyahu press conference after Operation Pillar of Defense.
quotes.relation: Directly matches the short, rapid-response logic associated with Pillar of Defense.

candidateObjectives: adapt quickly when central cities enter the threat envelope
prioritize long-range threats without neglecting border towns
win a short campaign before resource recovery matters
mechanicIdeas: range-class escalation where later waves unlock deeper targets
ready-reserve purchases that are efficient only early in the level
rapid-response score bonus for intercepting first-contact salvos

operations.name: Operation Protective Edge
operations.theater: Gaza Strip and Israel's southern and central regions
operations.summary: A prolonged Gaza conflict combining sustained rocket fire with Israeli efforts to target tunnels and other militant infrastructure.
historicalDynamics: tunnel threats created a different kind of border pressure than rockets alone
duration increased the importance of morale and economy management
the battle rhythm alternated between barrages and localized ground objectives

quotes.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
quotes.quote: Hamas chose to escalate the situation and it will pay a heavy price for doing so.
quotes.sourceNote: Netanyahu remarks as Operation Protective Edge expanded.
quotes.relation: Directly fits the escalation-and-counterpressure framing of Operation Protective Edge.

candidateObjectives: defend southern communities from both rockets and infiltration routes
spend limited army capacity on tunnel detection versus interceptors
survive a long conflict without collapsing the home front
mechanicIdeas: hidden tunnel nodes that periodically trigger border breach events
dual-threat waves mixing rockets and infiltration alerts
fatigue penalties that intensify if the level drags on too long

operations.name: Operation Guardian of the Walls
operations.theater: Gaza Strip and multiple Israeli cities
operations.summary: An eleven-day conflict featuring large rocket salvos, heavy pressure on multiple Israeli cities, and a strong home-front resilience dimension.
historicalDynamics: large salvo size stressed interception capacity
pressure extended across several population centers in quick succession
home-front disruption became a core gameplay analogue

quotes.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
quotes.quote: We changed the equation not only as regards to the operation but also as regards the future. If Hamas thinks we will tolerate a 'drizzle' of rockets, it is mistaken. What has been, we will not tolerate in the future.
quotes.sourceNote: Netanyahu remarks after the ceasefire ending Operation Guardian of the Walls.
quotes.relation: Directly captures the deterrence claim and saturation-response framing attached to Guardian of the Walls.

candidateObjectives: prevent interceptor saturation during heavy salvo spikes
keep major cities functioning while under repeated alarm cycles
use flexible defense layering instead of relying on one system
mechanicIdeas: salvo saturation mechanic that punishes over-concentration of defenses
city panic meter affected by near-simultaneous alarms
temporary reserve interceptors with limited recharge
